001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.concurrent.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
030
031/**
032 * Parses RDF into POJOs.
033 *
034 * <h5 class='topic'>Behavior-specific subclasses</h5>
035 * <p>
036 * The following direct subclasses are provided for language-specific parsers:
037 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
038 *    <li>
039 *       {@link RdfXmlParser} - RDF/XML and RDF/XML-ABBREV.
040 *    <li>
041 *       {@link NTripleParser} - N-TRIPLE.
042 *    <li>
043 *       {@link TurtleParser} - TURTLE.
044 *    <li>
045 *       {@link N3Parser} - N3.
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
049 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
050 * </ul>
051 *
052 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
053 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
054
055 * </ul>
056 */
057@SuppressWarnings({
058   "java:S100", // RDF method names (getRdfXml, isXmlLang, etc.) use domain-specific casing
059   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
060   "java:S110"  // Deep inheritance inherent to the RDF parser hierarchy.
061})
062public class RdfParser extends ReaderParser implements RdfMetaProvider {
063
064   // Property name constants
065   private static final String PROP_collectionFormat = "collectionFormat";
066   private static final String PROP_juneauBpNs = "juneauBpNs";
067   private static final String PROP_juneauNs = "juneauNs";
068   private static final String PROP_language = "language";
069   private static final String PROP_looseCollections = "looseCollections";
070   private static final String PROP_trimWhitespace = "trimWhitespace";
071
072   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
073   private static final String ARG_value = "value";
074   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
075
076   /**
077    * Builder class.
078    */
079   @SuppressWarnings({
080      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
081   })
082   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends ReaderParser.Builder<SELF> {
083
084      private static final Cache<HashKey,RdfParser> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, RdfParser.class).build();
085
086      private static final Namespace DEFAULT_JUNEAU_NS = Namespace.of("j", "http://www.apache.org/juneau/");
087      private static final Namespace DEFAULT_JUNEAUBP_NS = Namespace.of("jp", "http://www.apache.org/juneaubp/");
088
089      boolean trimWhitespace;
090      boolean looseCollections;
091      String language;
092      Namespace juneauNs;
093      Namespace juneauBpNs;
094      RdfCollectionFormat collectionFormat;
095      Map<String,Object> jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>();
096
097      /**
098       * Constructor, default settings.
099       */
100      protected Builder() {
101         super();
102         trimWhitespace = env("Rdf.trimWhitespace", false);
103         looseCollections = env("Rdf.looseCollections", false);
104         language = env("Rdf.language", "RDF/XML-ABBREV");
105         collectionFormat = env("Rdf.collectionFormat", RdfCollectionFormat.DEFAULT);
106         juneauNs = DEFAULT_JUNEAU_NS;
107         juneauBpNs = DEFAULT_JUNEAUBP_NS;
108         jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>();
109      }
110
111      /**
112       * Copy constructor.
113       *
114       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
115       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
116       */
117      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
118         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
119         collectionFormat = copyFrom.collectionFormat;
120         juneauBpNs = copyFrom.juneauBpNs;
121         juneauNs = copyFrom.juneauNs;
122         language = copyFrom.language;
123         looseCollections = copyFrom.looseCollections;
124         trimWhitespace = copyFrom.trimWhitespace;
125         jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>(copyFrom.jenaSettings);
126      }
127
128      /**
129       * Copy constructor.
130       *
131       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
132       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
133       */
134      protected Builder(RdfParser copyFrom) {
135         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
136         collectionFormat = copyFrom.collectionFormat;
137         juneauBpNs = copyFrom.juneauBpNs;
138         juneauNs = copyFrom.juneauNs;
139         language = copyFrom.language;
140         looseCollections = copyFrom.looseCollections;
141         trimWhitespace = copyFrom.trimWhitespace;
142         jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>(copyFrom.jenaSettings);
143      }
144
145      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
146      public RdfParser build() {
147         return cache(CACHE).build(RdfParser.class);
148      }
149
150      /**
151       * RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
152       *
153       * <ul class='values spaced-list'>
154       *    <li>
155       *       <js>"DEFAULT"</js> - Default format.  The default is an RDF Sequence container.
156       *    <li>
157       *       <js>"SEQ"</js> - RDF Sequence container.
158       *    <li>
159       *       <js>"BAG"</js> - RDF Bag container.
160       *    <li>
161       *       <js>"LIST"</js> - RDF List container.
162       *    <li>
163       *       <js>"MULTI_VALUED"</js> - Multi-valued properties.
164       * </ul>
165       *
166       * @param value The new value for this property.
167       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
168       * @return This object.
169       */
170      public SELF collectionFormat(RdfCollectionFormat value) {
171         collectionFormat = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
172         return self();
173      }
174
175      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
176      public abstract SELF copy();
177
178      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
179      public HashKey hashKey() {
180         // @formatter:off
181         return HashKey.of(
182            super.hashKey(),
183            trimWhitespace,
184            looseCollections,
185            language,
186            collectionFormat,
187            juneauNs,
188            juneauBpNs,
189            jenaSettings
190         );
191         // @formatter:on
192      }
193
194      /**
195       * Default XML namespace for bean properties.
196       *
197       * @param value
198       *    The new value for this property.
199       *    <br>The default is <code>{j:<js>'http://www.apache.org/juneaubp/'</js>}</code>.
200       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
201       * @return This object.
202       */
203      public SELF juneauBpNs(Namespace value) {
204         juneauBpNs = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
205         return self();
206      }
207
208      /**
209       * XML namespace for Juneau properties.
210       *
211       * @param value
212       *    The new value for this property.
213       *    <br>The default is <code>{j:<js>'http://www.apache.org/juneau/'</js>}</code>.
214       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
215       * @return This object.
216       */
217      public SELF juneauNs(Namespace value) {
218         juneauNs = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
219         return self();
220      }
221
222      /**
223       * RDF language.
224       *
225       * <p>
226       * Can be any of the following:
227       * <ul class='spaced-list'>
228       *    <li>
229       *       <js>"RDF/XML"</js>
230       *    <li>
231       *       <js>"RDF/XML-ABBREV"</js> (default)
232       *    <li>
233       *       <js>"N-TRIPLE"</js>
234       *    <li>
235       *       <js>"N3"</js> - General name for the N3 writer.
236       *       Will make a decision on exactly which writer to use (pretty writer, plain writer or simple writer) when
237       *       created.
238       *       Default is the pretty writer but can be overridden with system property
239       *       <c>org.apache.jena.n3.N3JenaWriter.writer</c>.
240       *    <li>
241       *       <js>"N3-PP"</js> - Name of the N3 pretty writer.
242       *       The pretty writer uses a frame-like layout, with prefixing, clustering like properties and embedding
243       *       one-referenced bNodes.
244       *    <li>
245       *       <js>"N3-PLAIN"</js> - Name of the N3 plain writer.
246       *       The plain writer writes records by subject.
247       *    <li>
248       *       <js>"N3-TRIPLES"</js> - Name of the N3 triples writer.
249       *       This writer writes one line per statement, like N-Triples, but does N3-style prefixing.
250       *    <li>
251       *       <js>"TURTLE"</js> -  Turtle writer.
252       *       http://www.dajobe.org/2004/01/turtle/
253       * </ul>
254       *
255       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
256       *    <li class='jm'>{@link RdfParser.Builder#n3()}
257       *    <li class='jm'>{@link RdfParser.Builder#ntriple()}
258       *    <li class='jm'>{@link RdfParser.Builder#turtle()}
259       *    <li class='jm'>{@link RdfParser.Builder#xml()}
260       * </ul>
261       *
262       * @param value The new value for this property.
263       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
264       * @return This object.
265       */
266      public SELF language(String value) {
267         language = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
268         return self();
269      }
270
271      /**
272       * Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
273       *
274       * <p>
275       * When specified, collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of
276       * resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
277       *
278       * <p>
279       * Note that this setting is specialized for RDF syntax, and is incompatible with the concept of
280       * losslessly representing POJO models, since the tree structure of these POJO models are lost
281       * when serialized as loose collections.
282       *
283       * <p>
284       * This setting is typically only useful if the beans being parsed into do not have a bean property
285       * annotated with {@link Rdf#beanUri @Rdf(beanUri=true)}.
286       *
287       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
288       * <p class='bjava'>
289       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = RdfSerializer
290       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
291       *       .xmlabbrev()
292       *       .looseCollections()
293       *       .build();
294       *
295       *    ReaderParser <jv>parser</jv> = RdfParser
296       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
297       *       .xml()
298       *       .looseCollections()
299       *       .build();
300       *
301       *    List&lt;MyBean&gt; <jv>list</jv> = <jsm>createListOfMyBeans</jsm>();
302       *
303       *    <jc>// Serialize to RDF/XML as loose resources</jc>
304       *    String <jv>rdfXml</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>list</jv>);
305       *
306       *    <jc>// Parse back into a Java collection</jc>
307       *    <jv>list</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>rdfXml</jv>, LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
308       *
309       *    MyBean[] <jv>bean</jv> = <jsm>createArrayOfMyBeans</jsm>();
310       *
311       *    <jc>// Serialize to RDF/XML as loose resources</jc>
312       *    <jv>rdfXml</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>beans</jv>);
313       *
314       *    <jc>// Parse back into a bean array</jc>
315       *    <jv>beans</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>rdfXml</jv>, MyBean[].<jk>class</jk>);
316       * </p>
317       *
318       * @return This object.
319       */
320      public SELF looseCollections() {
321         return looseCollections(true);
322      }
323
324      /**
325       * Same as {@link #looseCollections()} but explicitly specifies the setting value.
326       *
327       * @param value The new value for this property.
328       * @return This object.
329       */
330      public SELF looseCollections(boolean value) {
331         looseCollections = value;
332         return self();
333      }
334
335      /**
336       * RDF language.
337       *
338       * <p>
339       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_N3</jsf>)</code>.
340       *
341       * @return This object.
342       */
343      public SELF n3() {
344         return language(Constants.LANG_N3);
345      }
346
347      /**
348       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableAbbrevBaseURI</c>.
349       *
350       * <p>
351       * Controls whether to use abbreviations <c>&lt;&gt;</c> or <c>&lt;#&gt;</c>.
352       *
353       * @return This object.
354       */
355      public SELF n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri() {
356         return n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri(true);
357      }
358
359      /**
360       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableAbbrevBaseURI</c>.
361       *
362       * <p>
363       * Controls whether to use abbreviations <c>&lt;&gt;</c> or <c>&lt;#&gt;</c>.
364       *
365       * @param value
366       *    The new value for this setting.
367       * @return This object.
368       */
369      public SELF n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri(boolean value) {
370         return jena("n3.disableAbbrevBaseUri", value);
371      }
372
373      /**
374       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableObjectLists</c>.
375       *
376       * <p>
377       * Don't print object lists as comma separated lists.
378       *
379       * @return This object.
380       */
381      public SELF n3_disableObjectLists() {
382         return n3_disableObjectLists(true);
383      }
384
385      /**
386       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableObjectLists</c>.
387       *
388       * <p>
389       * Don't print object lists as comma separated lists.
390       *
391       * @param value
392       *    The new value for this property.
393       * @return This object.
394       */
395      public SELF n3_disableObjectLists(boolean value) {
396         return jena("n3.disableObjectLists", value);
397      }
398
399      /**
400       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseDoubles</c>.
401       *
402       * <p>
403       * Disallow the use of doubles as <c>123.456</c>.
404       *
405       * @return This object.
406       */
407      public SELF n3_disableUseDoubles() {
408         return n3_disableUseDoubles(true);
409      }
410
411      /**
412       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseDoubles</c>.
413       *
414       * <p>
415       * Disallow the use of doubles as <c>123.456</c>.
416       *
417       * @param value
418       *    The new value for this setting.
419       * @return This object.
420       */
421      public SELF n3_disableUseDoubles(boolean value) {
422         return jena("n3.disableUseDoubles", value);
423      }
424
425      /**
426       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUsePropertySymbols</c>.
427       *
428       * <p>
429       * Controls whether to use <c>a</c>, <c>=</c> and <c>=&gt;</c> in output
430       *
431       * @return This object.
432       */
433      public SELF n3_disableUsePropertySymbols() {
434         return n3_disableUsePropertySymbols(true);
435      }
436
437      /**
438       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUsePropertySymbols</c>.
439       *
440       * <p>
441       * Controls whether to use <c>a</c>, <c>=</c> and <c>=&gt;</c> in output
442       *
443       * @param value
444       *    The new value for this setting.
445       * @return This object.
446       */
447      public SELF n3_disableUsePropertySymbols(boolean value) {
448         return jena("n3.disableUsePropertySymbols", value);
449      }
450
451      /**
452       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseTripleQuotedStrings</c>.
453       *
454       * <p>
455       * Disallow the use of <c>"""</c> to delimit long strings.
456       *
457       * @return This object.
458       */
459      public SELF n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings() {
460         return n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings(true);
461      }
462
463      /**
464       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseTripleQuotedStrings</c>.
465       *
466       * <p>
467       * Disallow the use of <c>"""</c> to delimit long strings.
468       *
469       * @param value
470       *    The new value for this setting.
471       * @return This object.
472       */
473      public SELF n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings(boolean value) {
474         return jena("n3.disableUseTripleQuotedStrings", value);
475      }
476
477      /**
478       * N3/Turtle property: <c>indentProperty</c>.
479       *
480       * <p>
481       * Width to indent properties.
482       *
483       * @param value
484       *    The new value for this property.
485       * @return This object.
486       */
487      public SELF n3_indentProperty(int value) {
488         return jena("n3.indentProperty", value);
489      }
490
491      /**
492       * N3/Turtle property: <c>minGap</c>.
493       *
494       * <p>
495       * Minimum gap between items on a line.
496       *
497       * @param value
498       *    The new value for this property.
499       * @return This object.
500       */
501      public SELF n3_minGap(int value) {
502         return jena("n3.minGap", value);
503      }
504
505      /**
506       * N3/Turtle property: <c>propertyColumn</c>.
507       *
508       * <p>
509       * Width of the property column.
510       *
511       * @param value
512       *    The new value for this property.
513       * @return This object.
514       */
515      public SELF n3_propertyColumn(int value) {
516         return jena("n3.propertyColumn", value);
517      }
518
519      /**
520       * N3/Turtle property: <c>subjectColumn</c>.
521       *
522       * <p>
523       * If the subject is shorter than this value, the first property may go on the same line.
524       *
525       * @param value
526       *    The new value for this property.
527       * @return This object.
528       */
529      public SELF n3_subjectColumn(int value) {
530         return jena("n3.subjectColumn", value);
531      }
532
533      /**
534       * N3/Turtle property: <c>widePropertyLen</c>.
535       *
536       * <p>
537       * Width of the property column.
538       * Must be longer than <c>propertyColumn</c>.
539       *
540       * @param value
541       *    The new value for this property.
542       * @return This object.
543       */
544      public SELF n3_widePropertyLen(int value) {
545         return jena("n3.widePropertyLen", value);
546      }
547
548      /**
549       * RDF language.
550       *
551       * <p>
552       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_NTRIPLE</jsf>)</code>.
553       *
554       * @return This object.
555       */
556      public SELF ntriple() {
557         return language(Constants.LANG_NTRIPLE);
558      }
559
560      /**
561       * RDF/XML property: <c>allowBadURIs</c>.
562       *
563       * <p>
564       * URIs in the graph are, by default, checked prior to serialization.
565       *
566       * @return This object.
567       */
568      public SELF rdfxml_allowBadUris() {
569         return rdfxml_allowBadUris(true);
570      }
571
572      /**
573       * RDF/XML property: <c>allowBadURIs</c>.
574       *
575       * <p>
576       * URIs in the graph are, by default, checked prior to serialization.
577       *
578       * @param value
579       *    The new value for this property.
580       * @return This object.
581       */
582      public SELF rdfxml_allowBadUris(boolean value) {
583         return jena("rdfXml.allowBadURIs", value);
584      }
585
586      /**
587       * RDF/XML property: <c>attributeQuoteChar</c>.
588       *
589       * <p>
590       * The XML attribute quote character.
591       *
592       * @param value
593       *    The new value for this property.
594       * @return This object.
595       */
596      public SELF rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar(char value) {
597         return jena("rdfXml.attributeQuoteChar", value);
598      }
599
600      /**
601       * RDF/XML property: <c>blockRules</c>.
602       *
603       * <p>
604       * A list of <c>Resource</c> or a <c>String</c> being a comma separated list of fragment IDs from
605       * {doc http://www.w3.org/TR/rdf-syntax-grammar RDF Syntax Grammar} indicating grammar
606       * rules that will not be used.
607       *
608       * @param value
609       *    The new value for this property.
610       * @return This object.
611       */
612      public SELF rdfxml_blockRules(String value) {
613         return jena("rdfXml.blockRules", value);
614      }
615
616      /**
617       * RDF/XML property: <c>disableShowDoctypeDeclaration</c>.
618       *
619       * <p>
620       * If disabled, an XML doctype declaration isn't included in the output.
621       * This declaration includes a <c>!ENTITY</c> declaration for each prefix mapping in the model, and any
622       * attribute value that starts with the URI of that mapping is written as starting with the corresponding entity
623       * invocation.
624       *
625       * @return This object.
626       */
627      public SELF rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration() {
628         return rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration(true);
629      }
630
631      /**
632       * RDF/XML property: <c>disableShowDoctypeDeclaration</c>.
633       *
634       * <p>
635       * If disabled, an XML doctype declaration isn't included in the output.
636       * This declaration includes a <c>!ENTITY</c> declaration for each prefix mapping in the model, and any
637       * attribute value that starts with the URI of that mapping is written as starting with the corresponding entity
638       * invocation.
639       *
640       * @param value
641       *    The new value for this property.
642       * @return This object.
643       */
644      public SELF rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration(boolean value) {
645         return jena("rdfXml.disableShowDoctypeDeclaration", value);
646      }
647
648      /**
649       * RDF/XML ARP property: <c>embedding</c>.
650       *
651       * <p>
652       * Sets ARP to look for RDF embedded within an enclosing XML document.
653       *
654       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
655       *    <li>
656       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setEmbedding(boolean) ARPOptions.setEmbedding(boolean)}
657       * </ul>
658       *
659       * @return This object.
660       */
661      public SELF rdfxml_embedding() {
662         return rdfxml_embedding(true);
663      }
664
665      /**
666       * RDF/XML ARP property: <c>embedding</c>.
667       *
668       * <p>
669       * Sets ARP to look for RDF embedded within an enclosing XML document.
670       *
671       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
672       *    <li>
673       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setEmbedding(boolean) ARPOptions.setEmbedding(boolean)}
674       * </ul>
675       *
676       * @param value
677       *    The new value for this property.
678       * @return This object.
679       */
680      public SELF rdfxml_embedding(boolean value) {
681         return jena("rdfXml.embedding", value);
682      }
683
684      /**
685       * RDF/XML ARP property: <c>error-mode</c>.
686       *
687       * <p>
688       * This allows a coarse-grained approach to control of error handling.
689       *
690       * <ul class='values'>
691       *    <li><js>"default"</js>
692       *    <li><js>"lax"</js>
693       *    <li><js>"strict"</js>
694       *    <li><js>"strict-ignore"</js>
695       *    <li><js>"strict-warning"</js>
696       *    <li><js>"strict-error"</js>
697       *    <li><js>"strict-fatal"</js>
698       * </ul>
699       *
700       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
701       *    <li>
702       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setDefaultErrorMode() ARPOptions.setDefaultErrorMode()}
703       *    <li>
704       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setLaxErrorMode() ARPOptions.setLaxErrorMode()}
705       *    <li>
706       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setStrictErrorMode() ARPOptions.setStrictErrorMode()}
707       *    <li>
708       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setStrictErrorMode(int) ARPOptions.setStrictErrorMode(int)}
709       * </ul>
710       *
711       * @param value
712       *    The new value for this property.
713       * @return This object.
714       */
715      public SELF rdfxml_errorMode(String value) {
716         return jena("rdfXml.error-mode", value);
717      }
718
719      /**
720       * RDF/XML property: <c>iri_rules</c>.
721       *
722       * <p>
723       * Set the engine for checking and resolving.
724       *
725       * <ul class='values spaced-list'>
726       *    <li>
727       *       <js>"lax"</js> - The rules for RDF URI references only, which does permit spaces although the use of spaces
728       *       is not good practice.
729       *    <li>
730       *       <js>"strict"</js> - Sets the IRI engine with rules for valid IRIs, XLink and RDF; it does not permit spaces
731       *       in IRIs.
732       *    <li>
733       *       <js>"iri"</js> - Sets the IRI engine to IRI
734       *       ({doc http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3986.txt RFC 3986},
735       *       {doc http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3987.txt RFC 3987}).
736       *
737       * </ul>
738       *
739       * @param value
740       *    The new value for this property.
741       * @return This object.
742       */
743      public SELF rdfxml_iriRules(String value) {
744         return jena("rdfXml.iri-rules", value);
745      }
746
747      /**
748       * RDF/XML property: <c>longId</c>.
749       *
750       * <p>
751       * Whether to use long ID's for anon resources.
752       * Short ID's are easier to read, but can run out of memory on very large models.
753       *
754       * @return This object.
755       */
756      public SELF rdfxml_longId() {
757         return rdfxml_longId(true);
758      }
759
760      /**
761       * RDF/XML property: <c>longId</c>.
762       *
763       * <p>
764       * Whether to use long ID's for anon resources.
765       * Short ID's are easier to read, but can run out of memory on very large models.
766       *
767       * @param value
768       *    The new value for this property.
769       * @return This object.
770       */
771      public SELF rdfxml_longId(boolean value) {
772         return jena("rdfXml.longId", value);
773      }
774
775      /**
776       * RDF/XML property: <c>relativeURIs</c>.
777       *
778       * <p>
779       * What sort of relative URIs should be used.
780       *
781       * <p>
782       * A comma separate list of options:
783       * <ul class='spaced-list'>
784       *    <li>
785       *       <js>"same-document"</js> - Same-document references (e.g. <js>""</js> or <js>"#foo"</js>)
786       *    <li>
787       *       <js>"network"</js>  - Network paths (e.g. <js>"//example.org/foo"</js> omitting the URI scheme)
788       *    <li>
789       *       <js>"absolute"</js> - Absolute paths (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js> omitting the scheme and authority)
790       *    <li>
791       *       <js>"relative"</js> - Relative path not beginning in <js>"../"</js>
792       *    <li>
793       *       <js>"parent"</js> - Relative path beginning in <js>"../"</js>
794       *    <li>
795       *       <js>"grandparent"</js> - Relative path beginning in <js>"../../"</js>
796       * </ul>
797       *
798       * <p>
799       * The default value is <js>"same-document, absolute, relative, parent"</js>.
800       * To switch off relative URIs use the value <js>""</js>.
801       * Relative URIs of any of these types are output where possible if and only if the option has been specified.
802       *
803       * @param value
804       *    The new value for this property.
805       * @return This object.
806       */
807      public SELF rdfxml_relativeUris(String value) {
808         return jena("rdfXml.relativeURIs", value);
809      }
810
811      /**
812       * RDF/XML property: <c>showXmlDeclaration</c>.
813       *
814       * <ul class='values spaced-list'>
815       *    <li>
816       *       <js>"true"</js> - Add XML Declaration to the output.
817       *    <li>
818       *       <js>"false"</js> - Don't add XML Declaration to the output.
819       *    <li>
820       *       <js>"default"</js> - Only add an XML Declaration when asked to write to an <c>OutputStreamWriter</c>
821       *       that uses some encoding other than <c>UTF-8</c> or <c>UTF-16</c>.
822       *       In this case the encoding is shown in the XML declaration.
823       * </ul>
824       *
825       * @param value
826       *    The new value for this property.
827       * @return This object.
828       */
829      public SELF rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration(String value) {
830         return jena("rdfXml.showXmlDeclaration", value);
831      }
832
833      /**
834       * RDF/XML property: <c>tab</c>.
835       *
836       * <p>
837       * The number of spaces with which to indent XML child elements.
838       *
839       * @param value
840       *    The new value for this property.
841       * @return This object.
842       */
843      public SELF rdfxml_tab(int value) {
844         return jena("rdfXml.tab", value);
845      }
846
847      /**
848       * RDF/XML property: <c>xmlbase</c>.
849       *
850       * <p>
851       * The value to be included for an <xa>xml:base</xa> attribute on the root element in the file.
852       *
853       * @param value
854       *    The new value for this property.
855       * @return This object.
856       */
857      public SELF rdfxml_xmlbase(String value) {
858         return jena("rdfXml.xmlbase", value);
859      }
860
861      /**
862       * Trim whitespace from text elements.
863       *
864       * <p>
865       * When enabled, whitespace in text elements will be automatically trimmed.
866       *
867       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
868       * <p class='bjava'>
869       *    <jc>// Create an RDF parser that trims whitespace.</jc>
870       *    ReaderParser <jv>parser</jv> = RdfParser
871       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
872       *       .xml()
873       *       .trimWhitespace()
874       *       .build();
875       * </p>
876       *
877       * @return This object.
878       */
879      public SELF trimWhitespace() {
880         return trimWhitespace(true);
881      }
882
883      /**
884       * Same as {@link #trimWhitespace()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
885       *
886       * @param value
887       *    The new value for this setting.
888       * @return This object.
889       */
890      public SELF trimWhitespace(boolean value) {
891         trimWhitespace = value;
892         return self();
893      }
894
895      /**
896       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_TURTLE</jsf>)</code>.
897       *
898       * @return This object.
899       */
900      public SELF turtle() {
901         return language(Constants.LANG_TURTLE);
902      }
903
904      /**
905       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_JSONLD</jsf>)</code>.
906       *
907       * @return This object.
908       */
909      public SELF jsonLd() {
910         return language(Constants.LANG_JSONLD);
911      }
912
913      /**
914       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_NQUADS</jsf>)</code>.
915       *
916       * @return This object.
917       */
918      public SELF nQuads() {
919         return language(Constants.LANG_NQUADS);
920      }
921
922      /**
923       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_TRIG</jsf>)</code>.
924       *
925       * @return This object.
926       */
927      public SELF triG() {
928         return language(Constants.LANG_TRIG);
929      }
930
931      /**
932       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_TRIX</jsf>)</code>.
933       *
934       * @return This object.
935       */
936      public SELF triX() {
937         return language(Constants.LANG_TRIX);
938      }
939
940      /**
941       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_RDFJSON</jsf>)</code>.
942       *
943       * @return This object.
944       */
945      public SELF rdfJson() {
946         return language(Constants.LANG_RDFJSON);
947      }
948
949
950      /**
951       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_RDF_XML</jsf>)</code>.
952       *
953       * @return This object.
954       */
955      public SELF xml() {
956         return language(Constants.LANG_RDF_XML);
957      }
958
959      /**
960       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV</jsf>)</code>.
961       *
962       * @return This object.
963       */
964      public SELF xmlabbrev() {
965         return language(Constants.LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV);
966      }
967
968      SELF jena(String key, Object value) {
969         jenaSettings.put(key, value);
970         return self();
971      }
972   }
973
974   /**
975    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link RdfParser#create()} / {@link RdfParser#copy()} path.
976    */
977   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
978
979      DefaultBuilder() {}
980
981      DefaultBuilder(RdfParser copyFrom) {
982         super(copyFrom);
983      }
984
985      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
986         super(copyFrom);
987      }
988
989      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
990      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
991         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
992      }
993   }
994
995   /**
996    * Creates a new builder for this object.
997    *
998    * @return A new builder.
999    */
1000   @SuppressWarnings({
1001      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
1002   })
1003   public static Builder<?> create() {
1004      return new DefaultBuilder();
1005   }
1006
1007   private static String getConsumes(Builder<?> builder) {
1008      if (nn(builder.getConsumes()))
1009         return builder.getConsumes();
1010      return switch (builder.language) {
1011         case "RDF/XML", "RDF/XML-ABBREV" -> "text/xml+rdf";
1012         case "N-TRIPLE" -> "text/n-triple";
1013         case "N3" -> "text/n3";
1014         case "N3-PP" -> "text/n3-pp";
1015         case "N3-PLAIN" -> "text/n3-plain";
1016         case "N3-TRIPLES" -> "text/n3-triples";
1017         case "TURTLE" -> "text/turtle";
1018         case "JSON-LD" -> "application/ld+json";
1019         case "N-QUADS" -> "application/n-quads";
1020         case "TRIG" -> "application/trig";
1021         case "TRIX" -> "application/trix+xml";
1022         case "RDF/JSON" -> "application/rdf+json";
1023         default -> "text/xml+rdf";
1024      };
1025   }
1026
1027   protected final boolean looseCollections;
1028   protected final boolean trimWhitespace;
1029   protected final Namespace juneauBpNs;
1030   protected final Namespace juneauNs;
1031   protected final RdfCollectionFormat collectionFormat;
1032   protected final String language;
1033
1034   final Map<String,Object> jenaSettings;
1035   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,RdfClassMeta> rdfClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1036   private final Map<BeanMeta<?>,RdfBeanMeta> rdfBeanMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1037
1038   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,RdfBeanPropertyMeta> rdfBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1039   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,XmlClassMeta> xmlClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1040   private final Map<BeanMeta<?>,XmlBeanMeta> xmlBeanMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1041
1042   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,XmlBeanPropertyMeta> xmlBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1043
1044   /**
1045    * Constructor.
1046    *
1047    * @param builder The builder for this object.
1048    */
1049   public RdfParser(Builder<?> builder) {
1050      super(builder.consumes(getConsumes(builder)));
1051
1052      collectionFormat = builder.collectionFormat;
1053      juneauBpNs = builder.juneauBpNs;
1054      juneauNs = builder.juneauNs;
1055      language = builder.language;
1056      looseCollections = builder.looseCollections;
1057      trimWhitespace = builder.trimWhitespace;
1058      jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>(builder.jenaSettings);
1059   }
1060
1061   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1062   public Builder<?> copy() {
1063      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
1064   }
1065
1066   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1067   public RdfParserSession.Builder createSession() {
1068      return RdfParserSession.create(this);
1069   }
1070
1071   @Override /* Overridden from RdfMetaProvider */
1072   public RdfBeanMeta getRdfBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
1073      return rdfBeanMetas.computeIfAbsent(bm, k -> new RdfBeanMeta(k, this));
1074   }
1075
1076   @Override /* Overridden from RdfMetaProvider */
1077   public RdfBeanPropertyMeta getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
1078      return rdfBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new RdfBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
1079   }
1080
1081   @Override /* Overridden from RdfMetaProvider */
1082   public RdfClassMeta getRdfClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
1083      return rdfClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new RdfClassMeta(k, this));
1084   }
1085
1086   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1087   public RdfParserSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
1088
1089   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
1090   public XmlBeanMeta getXmlBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
1091      return xmlBeanMetas.computeIfAbsent(bm, k -> new XmlBeanMeta(k, this));
1092   }
1093
1094   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
1095   public XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
1096      return xmlBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new XmlBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
1097   }
1098
1099   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
1100   public XmlClassMeta getXmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
1101      return xmlClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new XmlClassMeta(k, this));
1102   }
1103
1104   /**
1105    * RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
1106    *
1107    * @see RdfParser.Builder#collectionFormat(RdfCollectionFormat)
1108    * @return
1109    *    RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
1110    */
1111   protected final RdfCollectionFormat getCollectionFormat() { return collectionFormat; }
1112
1113   /**
1114    * All Jena-related configuration properties.
1115    *
1116    * @return
1117    *    A map of all Jena-related configuration properties.
1118    */
1119   protected final Map<String,Object> getJenaSettings() { return jenaSettings; }
1120
1121   /**
1122    * Default XML namespace for bean properties.
1123    *
1124    * @see RdfParser.Builder#juneauBpNs(Namespace)
1125    * @return
1126    *    Default XML namespace for bean properties.
1127    */
1128   protected final Namespace getJuneauBpNs() { return juneauBpNs; }
1129
1130   /**
1131    * XML namespace for Juneau properties.
1132    *
1133    * @see RdfParser.Builder#juneauNs(Namespace)
1134    * @return
1135    *    XML namespace for Juneau properties.
1136    */
1137   protected final Namespace getJuneauNs() { return juneauNs; }
1138
1139   /**
1140    * RDF language.
1141    *
1142    * @see RdfParser.Builder#language(String)
1143    * @return
1144    *    The RDF language to use.
1145    */
1146   protected final String getLanguage() { return language; }
1147
1148   /**
1149    * Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
1150    *
1151    * @see RdfParser.Builder#looseCollections()
1152    * @return
1153    *    <jk>true</jk> if collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of
1154    *    resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
1155    */
1156   protected final boolean isLooseCollections() { return looseCollections; }
1157
1158   /**
1159    * Trim whitespace from text elements.
1160    *
1161    * @see RdfParser.Builder#trimWhitespace()
1162    * @return
1163    *    <jk>true</jk> if whitespace in text elements will be automatically trimmed.
1164    */
1165   protected final boolean isTrimWhitespace() { return trimWhitespace; }
1166
1167   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParser */
1168   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
1169      return super.properties()
1170         .a(PROP_collectionFormat, collectionFormat)
1171         .a(PROP_juneauBpNs, juneauBpNs)
1172         .a(PROP_juneauNs, juneauNs)
1173         .a(PROP_language, language)
1174         .a(PROP_looseCollections, looseCollections)
1175         .a(PROP_trimWhitespace, trimWhitespace);
1176   }
1177}
